note: Versioned SYNTHETIC fixture set for the B278/B280/B281 harness. No real client data — every fixture is generated deterministically (fixed PRNG seed, fixed dates) and scrubbed to 'E2E …' placeholders. Regenerate fixtures + goldens with `node scripts/build-fixtures.mjs`; CI runs `--check` to fail on drift. The dense-testfit site is additionally seedable into the e2e account via e2e/seed/seed-fixtures.sql (id e2e-fixture-testfit).

fixtures.name: detention-pond-regression
fixtures.repro: Goose-Creek-class detention: known geometry -> engine-captured contour areas + storage volume.

fixtures.name: dense-gantt-project
fixtures.repro: Pappadoupolos-scale dense schedule (~119 tasks / ~103 deps), exercised at ~33% zoom in the browser spec.

fixtures.name: dense-site-testfit
fixtures.repro: Dense industrial test-fit: building + bonded children + truck courts + bump-outs + parking; tombstone-delete + merge-no-resurrect.

fixtures.name: concurrency-two-writer
fixtures.repro: Two writers over one row: stale writer must conflict (no silent clobber); un-migrated DB degrades.

liveVerifyCoverage.live: e2e/gantt-density.spec.js (on-screen GanttView vs print buildGanttSVG glyph parity)
e2e/gantt-density.spec.js (~33% zoom, no NaN arrow endpoints, no label overlap) + e2e/site-testfit.spec.js (dense canvas renders, no pageerror)
VERIFICATION.md V204 — genuine two-signed-in-tabs race on planyr.io
